summary: Stage-focused decompilation PR replacing placeholder comments with C implementations across grcorneria, grgreatbay, grinishie1, grkinokoroute, grkongo, grmutecity, groldpupupu, grpura, and grshrineroute, plus header prototype/type updates. The PR body claims 13 matched functions across 9 stage files; the bot report confirms 5 new 100% matches and 17 improvements, with several functions near but not at 100%.

key_files.role: Implemented grCorneria_801E0E40 debug conversation cycling and grCorneria_801E1878 Great Fox translation synchronization; added controller/debug includes and grCn_804D466C.
evidence_refs: pr_body: function summaries for grCorneria_801E0E40 and grCorneria_801E1878
bot_report: grCorneria_801E0E40 new 100% match; grCorneria_801E1878 improved to 98.77%

key_files.role: Replaced UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS prototype for grCorneria_801E0E40 with void(void).
Implemented weighted random selection for grGreatBay_801F62F8 with reroll loop, HSD_Randi, and HSD_ASSERT fallback.
Replaced UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS prototype for grGreatBay_801F62F8 with s32(s32).
Implemented scale-platform initialization grInishie1_801FC018 and collision callback fn_801FC9AC for weight accumulation.
evidence_refs: bot_report: grInishie1_801FC018 new 100% match; fn_801FC9AC improved to 99.78%

key_files.role: Implemented grKinokoRoute_80208564 as a loop over 51 destructible brick block depths, attaching material items and callbacks.
Replaced UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS prototype for grKinokoRoute_80208564 with void(HSD_GObj*).
Implemented grKongo_801D7E78 to retrieve world or local translation depending on stage map_id; added baselib/jobj include.
Implemented grMuteCity_801F2C10 shadow visibility/bounds check against Mute City platform joints and slope; added ground include.
Extended local data struct fields, implemented stage object callback setup grOldPupupu_802108B4 and wind-zone velocity callback fn_802112F4; added ftlib include.
evidence_refs: bot_report: grOldPupupu_802108B4 improved to 99.97%; fn_802112F4 improved to 99.88%

key_files.role: Replaced UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS prototype for fn_802112F4 with bool(Ground_GObj*, HSD_GObj*, Vec3*).
Implemented grPura_80213128 recursive/iterative DObj TEV compilation helper and updated call sites to pass HSD_DObj*.
evidence_refs: bot_report: grPura_80213128 new 100% match; grPura_80213250 improved slightly

key_files.role: Replaced UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS prototype for grPura_80213128 with void(HSD_DObj*).
Implemented reflection-platform setup grShrineRoute_80209AF0 and light-object append/setup grShrineRoute_8020AC44; added extern declarations for light desc and Vec3.
evidence_refs: bot_report: grShrineRoute_8020AC44 new 100% match; grShrineRoute_80209AF0 improved to 99.89%

key_files.role: Header prototype changed for a Shrine Route function, but the diff excerpt is truncated before exact signature details.
Ground type/struct updates supporting the stage implementations; exact fields are not visible in loaded diff excerpt.
evidence_refs: metadata_json: types.h listed among changed files

what_changed: Converted placeholder decomp markers into C bodies for 13 stage functions listed in the PR body.
Updated several stage headers from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to concrete signatures where function bodies were recovered.
Added or adjusted includes for dependencies such as baselib/controller.h, baselib/debug.h, baselib/jobj.h, gr/ground.h, and ft/ftlib.h.
Added or expanded typed access to GroundVars fields such as corneria, inishie1, mutecity, and shrineroute3 union members in the implemented functions.
Introduced stage data declarations or struct fields needed by the implementations, including grCn_804D466C, grSh_Route_803E5D90, grSh_Route_803B8378, and additional groldpupupu data fields.
Bot report recorded 61.17% matched code overall, +0.03%, +1220 bytes, with 5 new 100% function matches and 17 improved unmatched items.

smart_moves.text: Header prototypes were updated alongside recovered function bodies instead of leaving UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS for the touched symbols.
The grKinokoRoute brick setup uses a natural for-loop over a 51-entry depth table rather than repeated generated-looking setup blocks.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: grKinokoRoute_80208564 for loop over depths[0..50]

smart_moves.text: Stage object and joint operations use existing helper APIs and typed structures such as GET_GROUND, GET_JOBJ, Ground_801C3FA4, HSD_JObjGetTranslation, HSD_JObjSetTranslate, and HSD_JObjGetTranslationY.
The PR kept a narrow stage scope: all changed files are under src/melee/gr and the PR body summarizes stage functions only.
evidence_refs: pr_body: 13 matched functions across 9 stage files

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a recovered body proves a stage function's signature, update the corresponding gr/*.h prototype at the same time so UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS does not persist.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: groldpupupu.h bool fn_802112F4(Ground_GObj*, HSD_GObj*, Vec3*)

decomp_lessons.lesson: For repeated stage setup across sequential joint depths, a small local table plus a natural loop can express the authored logic compactly and still yield a near-match.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: grKinokoRoute_80208564 depths[] and for (i = 0; i < 0x33U; i++)

decomp_lessons.lesson: Stage decomp bodies often become clearer when recovered around existing engine helpers for jobs, grounds, materials, collisions, light objects, and callbacks instead of raw offset-only access.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: Ground_801C3FA4 and mpJointSetCb1 in grInishie1_801FC018

naming_conventions.name: Address-style function names retained for unknown or not-yet-semantic functions, e.g. grCorneria_801E0E40, grGreatBay_801F62F8, fn_801FC9AC.
evidence_refs: pr_body: function list uses address-style names
diff_excerpt: implemented functions retain address-style identifiers

naming_conventions.name: Short local role names are used where roles are clear: gp for Ground*, gobj for HSD_GObj/Ground_GObj, jobj for HSD_JObj, pos for Vec3 position, vel for velocity.
GroundVars fields remain offset-like when semantics are not proven, e.g. xE0, xE4, x108, x10C, xD0, xD4.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: grInishie1_801FC018 and fn_801FC9AC field accesses

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: PAD_STACK was used narrowly in several recovered functions to preserve stack/code shape.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.notes: The bot report supports progress/new matches, but the PR evidence does not provide per-PAD_STACK objdiff justification.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Natural loop and local depth array used to replace repeated setup for 51 Mushroom Kingdom II block joints.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: grKinokoRoute_80208564 depths[] and for loop

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Goto-style done label retained in grKongo_801D7E78 and grGreatBay_801F62F8, likely matching control-flow shape for return convergence.
Explicit function-pointer cast used when passing grKinokoRoute_802084B4 as a material callback.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: grMaterial_801C8CFC callback cast in grKinokoRoute_80208564

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: HSD_ASSERT macro used for an impossible weighted-random fallthrough in grGreatBay_801F62F8 instead of a raw assert block.
